MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for post-trial hearings re Defendant Burke's motion for attorney fees; and Motion for Failure of Proof and Judgment Notwithstanding the Verdict (C.C.P. 629). Plaintiffs' Motion to disqualify Jetro Busch and Anna Liu from representing Defendants Eileen Burke and Rand Nathan.
The Court, court personnel, all counsel, Defendants Ms. Burkes and Mr. Nathan are present in open court. The case is called and counsel state their respective appearances.
The Court states for the record the completed jury trial history and verdict.
The Court hears oral argument from each counsel and from Ms. Burke.
After hearing the oral arguments and considering the moving documents, the court gives tentative suggestions to parties if they are jointly want a settlement conference, which are refused by the parties. Parties agreed to file and submit their costs bill, opposition to all fee motion, reply, and new trial motion and strike cost due by Dec. 14, 2015. Copy shall be sent to the judge at the address given by Fed Ex or mail at least one week before the next hearing date.
The Court CONTINUED the matter to Dec. 22, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 303 (tentative) for further hearings. Notice is waived.
Court Adjourned.
